creator: vmagerya@gmail.com
text:
Hi, folks. Can we commit an update to 0.10.7 instead?
The patch is at [1], tinderbox logs are at [2].

Also, seeing that nivit@ has been silent the past few months, I propose
to take over maintainership of this port, as I use it heavily and would
like to see updated.

[1] http://tx97.net/~magv/py-bottle-0.10.7.diff
[2] https://redports.org/buildarchive/20120117155034-52694/
